title: ActiveCampaign vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or HubSpot?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
